title: 英検準2級 2025年度 第3回 リスニング

source.segmentation: ffmpeg silencedetectで約10秒の解答無音を検出し、各設問ごとのMP3クリップを生成。第1部の選択肢は放送されるため台本から取得。

choices: I watched the weather report.
We could go tomorrow.
Let's play a game of cards.
lessons.script:
★It's raining again, Sarah.
☆I know. The weather's been bad all weekend. It's supposed to rain tomorrow, too.
★Well, what do you want to do today?
tips: 短縮形は弱く速く出ます: It's, weather's
want to は語の切れ目より、ひとまとまりの音で拾う。
数字・時制表現は選択肢の根拠になりやすいので、単語だけでなく周辺表現も確認する。
第1部は対話の最後の一文への応答を選ぶ。最後の発話の意図を特に丁寧に聞く。

choices: Well, I used to cook part-time in high school.

lessons.question: What will Jun and Anna do at lunchtime?
choices: Visit Jun's grandfather.
Go to Mr. Ito's desk.
Talk about their club's schedule.
Finish their homework.
lessons.script:
☆Jun, you weren't at the hiking-club meeting yesterday.
★Hi, Anna. I had to visit my grandpa in the hospital. Did I miss anything important?
☆Yes. Mr. Ito told us next month's hiking schedule.
★OK. I have to go to class now, so tell me about it at lunchtime.
☆☆
tips: 短縮形は弱く速く出ます: month's, weren't

choices: By delivering it herself.
By regular mail.

lessons.script:

★Oh, what about the Speedy Express delivery service?
☆I don't recommend it. They lost one of my packages. I always send packages by bicycle delivery.
It's cheap, and your package will be delivered right away.
☆☆

lessons.question: What is one thing John told Sarah to do?
choices: Wear warm clothes.
Take a train to the mountains.
Buy some new shoes.
Go hiking in summer.
lessons.script:
★Sarah and John like going hiking together, but they usually go in the summer. John suggested that
they go hiking in winter, too. Sarah thought it would be too cold, but John said she should wear warm
clothes. He also said that she should pack some snacks, so they can eat them during the hike. Sarah
agreed.
☆☆
tips: 第3部は1文目で場面、最後の文で結論が出やすい。冒頭と末尾を特に丁寧に聞く。
Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

lessons.question: What is one thing the speaker says about Sarah?
choices: Her mother works at a hospital.
She takes many pictures of animals.
She wants to care for animals.
She is an animal trainer.
lessons.script:
★Sarah is a high school student who loves animals. She often goes to an animal hospital near her
home to help the veterinarians, and she has even done this on the weekends. She hopes to become a
veterinarian one day so that she can take care of animals for a living.
☆☆
tips: 第3部は1文目で場面、最後の文で結論が出やすい。冒頭と末尾を特に丁寧に聞く。

lessons.question: Why did Marie Curie study radioactivity?
choices: She wanted to get money from the French government.
She wanted to help her husband.
She wanted to understand atomic science.
She wanted to win a Nobel Prize.
lessons.script:
☆Marie Curie was a physicist and a chemist. She studied radioactivity because she wanted to
understand atomic science. Marie and her husband used their own money to start a research laboratory,
and later, Marie received money from the French government. She won Nobel Prizes in physics and
chemistry for her work in radioactivity.
☆☆
tips: 第3部は1文目で場面、最後の文で結論が出やすい。冒頭と末尾を特に丁寧に聞く。
Question の疑問詞を確認し、何を答える問題かを先に固定する。

choices: Her ticket was for the front row.
Her brother got a free ticket.
She danced with her brother.
Her brother bought a CD.
lessons.script:
★Emma went to a concert with her older brother. She was excited because the band played her
favorite song, and she danced a lot while it was being played. She was also happy when her brother
bought a CD of the band's music after the concert. That way, she could listen to more of the band's
songs at home.
☆☆

choices: Most players are students.

lessons.script:
★Basketball is a sport that involves a lot of movement. It improves players' strength, speed, and
fitness. College and professional basketball players often play long games. Because of this, they need
to make sure that they have the strength to keep going until the end of the game.
